report.summary: Standup v12 (~11:00 CET): 343 pages live (+5 since v11 — DA Layer, DeFi Options, Aave, Lido, Uniswap promoted via publish-v5), PUBLISH_QUEUE down to 7 items (2 build-v9 guides added, 5 promoted out), build-v9 shipped Chain Abstraction + Prediction Markets with interactive calculator, community-v24 extended social calendar to Mar 24, rate limiter STILL 0/6 public routes with FOMC T-2 Wednesday — all 6 agents ran last cycle.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v11 (~10:10 CET)
items: Pages live: 343 (+5 from v11's 338). Publish-v5 promoted /learn/data-availability-layer-guide-2026, /learn/defi-options-trading-guide-2026, /ecosystem/aave, /ecosystem/lido, /ecosystem/uniswap. Vercel deploy TvkGf8E6n queued.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 7 items. 2 fresh from build-v9 (chain-abstraction-guide-2026, crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026) + 2 ecosystem (compound, curve) + 2 learn (ai-depin-crypto, advanced-defi-strategies) + /news. Queue slightly replenished from build-v9 after publish-v5 drain.

Build-v9 shipped 2 new learn guides: Chain Abstraction Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 8 sections, 9-project ecosystem table, Particle/NEAR/Socket/Keystore deep-dives) and Crypto Prediction Markets Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, interactive PredictionMarketCalculator.tsx, Kalshi/Polymarket/Azuro/Drift BET profiles, 73% accuracy data). Both in PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Community-v24 extended social calendar to Mon Mar 24: Chain Abstraction thread (Sun Mar 23), Prediction Markets tweet (Sun Mar 23), DeFi Big Three ecosystem tweet (Mon Mar 24). 2 new OG social cards (chain-abstraction + prediction-markets). Newsletter amendments queued for Thu Mar 19.
Design cycle ran — whale-watch refinements carried forward from v8.
EOD-v11 confirmed: 349 published slugs audited (post publish-v5), 249 with page.tsx, 100 still missing (28.7% gap). 0 regressions. All 6 API routes structurally healthy. Rate limiter still unwired.

Top content signals (unchanged): Tax guide +90% (Apr 15 = 30 days), Pectra upgrade +91% (Apr 10 = 25 days), Altcoin ETF tracker +91% (only free tracker), DeFAI guide +89% (March narrative). New: Prediction markets ($5B/week volume) and chain abstraction (Messari 'key to victory') entering coverage for first time.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ publish-v5 — 5 pages promoted (DA Layer, DeFi Options, Aave, Lido, Uniswap). Vercel deploy TvkGf8E6n triggered.
SHIPPED ✅ build-v9 — 2 new learn guides (Chain Abstraction, Prediction Markets) with PredictionMarketCalculator interactive component. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v24 — Social calendar extended to Mar 24. 2 new OG social cards. Newsletter amendments for Thu Mar 19.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v11 — Full QA pass. 0 new regressions. 6/6 API routes healthy.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC is Wed Mar 18 (T-2). checkRateLimit() exists but NOT imported in prices, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields, fear-greed. This is now the 6th consecutive cycle flagged.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged next.config.ts drops `output: 'standalone'` — 432 files bottled up (6th cycle flagged).
BLOCKER 🔴 Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — 3 routes go 404 if committed.
BLOCKER 🔴 middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict unresolved.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 100/349 published slugs missing page.tsx (~29% returning 404).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 4/6 API routes lack fallback data (defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 DefiLlama /api/defi-yields fallback still missing.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial ~6 days remaining — Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Wire rate limiter to all 6 public API routes NOW. FOMC is Wednesday (T-2). This is a ~30 min programmer task that has been P0 carry-over for 6 consecutive cycles. Import checkRateLimit() into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. We cannot launch into an FOMC traffic spike with unprotected endpoints. Assign: degen-programmer.

PRIORITY 2 — Resolve staged blockers and commit the 432-file batch. Three steps: (1) git restore --staged next.config.ts; (2) verify intent on badges/courses deletions; (3) resolve middleware.ts conflict. This unblocks crypto-cards hub (31 pages), 92 compare pages, 4 API routes. 6 cycles of SEO momentum locked behind a git conflict. Assign: degen-programmer + Jefe approval on deletions.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote chain-abstraction + prediction-markets from PUBLISH_QUEUE + add API fallback data. Both guides have interactive components, OG images, and social content pre-drafted (community-v24). Simultaneously add hardcoded fallback to the 4 unprotected API routes before FOMC traffic surge. Assign: degen-publish-queue + degen-data-engineer.

STRATEGIC NOTE — We're now at 343 live pages with only 7 in queue. Content velocity is outpacing publish velocity — the 432 staged files represent a massive batch waiting to unlock. FOMC (Wed), Tax season (Apr 15, 30 days), and Ethereum Pectra (Apr 10, 25 days) are three converging traffic spikes. Rate limiter + staged batch resolution must happen before Wednesday to capture this window. Next build cycle Day 41: consider Solana vs Ethereum 2026 deep-dive or MEV Guide 2026.
